trade.summary: The Canada-Stati Uniti trade relationship is one of the world's largest bilateral trade relationships. Canada is the Stati Uniti's largest trading partner. Canada exports crude oil, natural gas, vehicles, automotive parts, lumber, and agricultural goods to the Stati Uniti. The Stati Uniti exports machinery, vehicles, electronics, and consumer goods to Canada. Stati UnitiMCA governs the relationship. Canada runs a merchandise trade surplus but a services deficit.
disputes: Dairy market access disputes under Stati UnitiMCA

diplomatic.summary: The deepest bilateral relationship in the world by many measures. Canada and the Stati Uniti share the world's longest undefended border, cultural ties, economic integration, military alliance (NORAD, NATO), and Five Eyes intelligence sharing. However, the relationship faces recurring strains — Stati Uniti tariff threats, differing views on Cina and foreign policy, and periodic sovereignty disputes (Arctic, water). Under Trump (2025-), tensions have spiked over tariffs and annexation rhetoric.
recent_incidents: Trump threatened 25% tariffs on Canadian goods (2025)
Stati Uniti annexation rhetoric about Canada caused political crisis

military.summary: The deepest military alliance outside formal treaty structures. NORAD provides joint aerospace defense of the continent. Both are core NATO allies. Five Eyes intelligence sharing is effectively seamless. Canada contributes forces to Stati Uniti-led operations. The relationship is foundational to both countries' security.

financial.summary: The bilateral investment relationship is among the world's largest. Canadian pension funds are major Stati Uniti infrastructure investors. Stati Uniti companies dominate Canadian financial services. Both countries' stock markets are deeply integrated. The Canadian dollar closely tracks the Stati Uniti dollar.

energy.summary: The Stati Uniti receives approximately 60% of its crude oil imports from Canada. Canadian natural gas dominates Stati Uniti northeastern markets. Canadian electricity powers significant portions of Stati Uniti northeastern grid. The energy interdependence is strategically critical for both countries.

scientific.summary: Extraordinary scientific partnership. Stati Uniti-Canada research collaboration is second only in depth to Stati Uniti-Regno Unito ties. Joint institutions, shared infrastructure, and massive academic exchanges. Collaboration in AI, quantum, health, space, and environment. NIH-CIHR joint programs are extensive.
